title: Colourful hats and popcorn welcome spring at Fanie Theron Pre-primary
description: CRADOCK NEWS - Spring was welcomed in style...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"CRADOCK NEWS - Spring was welcomed in style at the Fanie Theron Pre-Primary School on 1 September.","html":"CRADOCK NEWS - Spring was welcomed in style at the Fanie Theron Pre-Primary School on 1 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to the school's media representative, Quené Beukes, the learners dressed in pink, red and other bright colours as an introduction to the new season."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Learners also showed off their creative flair with their most amazing homemade spring hats - each one unique and full of colour!","html":"\"Learners also showed off their creative flair with their most amazing homemade spring hats - each one unique and full of colour!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To end off this cheerful day, everyone enjoyed some delicious popcorn and a fun movie making the celebration even more special.","html":"To end off this cheerful day, everyone enjoyed some delicious popcorn and a fun movie making the celebration even more special."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"What a joyful way to step into a new season full of growth, colour and sunshine!\"","html":"What a joyful way to step into a new season full of growth, colour and sunshine!\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Colourful hats and popcorn welcome spring at Fanie Theron Pre-primary
